common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: merchant_id
common_params.description: Shopee’s unique identifier for a merchant. Required for all merchant level requests(CB CNSC user calling global product related APIs).

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, merchant_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Get eligible shop list by warehouse id

request_params.description:
1 means pickup warehouse

2 means return warehouse
request_params.name: warehouse_type

request_params.description:
// how to use DoubleSidedCursor

// Get data for the first page: Please pass next_id = 0 or nil, page_size = {your page size}.

// Get data for the next page: Please pass the Cursor from the previous response, and set prev_id=nil;

// Get data for the prev page: Please pass the Cursor from the previous response, and set next_id=nil;

// Stop fetching next data: The Cursor.next_id in the previous response is nil.

// Stop fetching prev data: The Cursor.prev_id in the previous response is nil.
request_params.name: cursor

children.description: The size of one page. Limit is [1,30].
children.name: page_size

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier of the API request for error tracking.
Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://open.admin.shopee.io/api/v2/merchant/list_shop_by_warehouse?access_token=access_token&merchant_id=merchant_id&partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "cursor": {},
    "warehouse_id": 100,
    "warehouse_type": 1
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

value.message: warehouse_type: warehouse_type must be one of the following: 1, 2
